name: Pickled Beets & Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the beets with their liquid into a small bowl.
2. Stir in the lemon juice and ground cloves.
3. Quarter, core, and peel the apple.
4. Thinly slice the apple and add it to the bowl with the beet mixture.
5. Let the apple-beet mixture stand at room temperature until serving time.
6. If desired, garnish with thin lemon slices.
